ideation: This sequence mimics the action of picking or arranging hair using a comb or similar tool. The robot will use its right arm, bringing the hand to the head and then moving it back to the side. The left arm will remain at rest to emphasize the action of the right arm. I will ensure that each frame represents a distinct position in the gesture and that the transitions are smooth and natural. In the first frame, both arms are at rest. In the second frame, the right arm moves up to the head area. In the third frame, the right arm performs a combing motion around the head. In the fourth frame, the right arm is moving away from the head. In the fifth frame, the right arm is back to its resting position, and the left arm remains at rest throughout the animation. The sequence should be fluid and convey the intention of styling or arranging hair.

frames.beat: both arms hang at rest, ready to style
right arm lifts smoothly towards the head
fingers comb through imaginary hair with a flourish
the hand sweeps away from the styled hair
right arm returns to rest, the style complete
